config.ok_zoomer.appearance.reduce_view_: Reduces view bobbing proportionally to how far the zoom is.
config.ok_zoomer.appearance.see_distant_: Keeps the entity distance intact while zooming in. Creatures and certain blocks may not be visible from afar.
Expands the entity distance while zooming in, allowing creatures and certain blocks to be seen from afar. Without having Sodium installed, this may have a big performance impact during zoom.
Expands the entity distance while zooming in, allowing creatures and certain blocks to be seen from afar. This will only be enabled if the Sodium mod is installed.
config.ok_zoomer.appearance.smart_occlus: Improves performance by making the game render less of the world while zoomed in. This feature depends on the Sodium mod in order to work.
config.ok_zoomer.appearance.zoom_overlay: Uses the spyglass overlay as the zoom overlay.
Uses a vignette as the zoom overlay. The vignette texture can be found at assets/ok_zoomer/textures/misc/zoom_overlay.png
config.ok_zoomer.controls.cinematic_came: Uses the game's cinematic camera while zooming.
Changes the speed of the cinematic camera.
config.ok_zoomer.controls.extra_key_bind: Adds zoom manipulation keys along with the zoom key. A game restart will be required in order to apply the changes.
config.ok_zoomer.controls.reduce_sensiti: Reduces the mouse sensitivity proportionally to how far the zoom is.
config.ok_zoomer.controls.sensitivity_sc: The scale of the mouse sensitivity used while zooming.
Zooming will act as a complete replacement of the spyglass zoom, requiring one to work and replacing its zoom as well.
Zooming won't require a spyglass and won't replace its zoom.
Zooming will replace the spyglass zoom but it won't require one in order to work.
Zooming will require a spyglass in order to work. This option is configurable through the ok_zoomer:zoom_dependencies item tag.
config.ok_zoomer.controls.spyglass_sound: Adds the spyglass's sounds effects on alternating zoom.
config.ok_zoomer.controls.zoom_mode.hold: The zoom will require the zoom key to be held.
config.ok_zoomer.controls.zoom_mode.pers: The zoom will always be enabled, with the zoom key being used for zoom scrolling.
config.ok_zoomer.controls.zoom_mode.togg: The zoom will be toggled by the zoom key.
config.ok_zoomer.presets.apply_preset.to: Resets the settings to the selected preset.
config.ok_zoomer.presets.preset.camera.t: A zoom featuring a clean cinematic view with no obstructions.
A zoom that accurately emulates OptiFine's zoom.
config.ok_zoomer.presets.preset.competit: A pure zoom that keeps everything in view.
config.ok_zoomer.presets.preset.persiste: A zoom configured with the Persistent mode in mind.
config.ok_zoomer.presets.preset.spyglass: A zoom that replaces and mimics the spyglass' zoom.
config.ok_zoomer.presets.preset.zoominat: A zoom that closely simulates Zoomify's zoom without imitating its technical limitations.
config.ok_zoomer.title: Ok Zoomer Settings
Displays debug information for zoom scrolling. This may help with configuring it
Uses sliders for numeric options instead of number inputs, trading number range for ease of configuration.
config.ok_zoomer.tweaks.print_owo_on_sta: Prints a random owo in the console when the game starts.
config.ok_zoomer.tweaks.show_settings_on: Adds a button to open Ok Zoomer settings next to the zoom key bind.
config.ok_zoomer.zoom_scrolling.default_: The default scroll step to use on zooming in.
config.ok_zoomer.zoom_scrolling.forget_s: If enabled, the current scroll step is forgotten once zooming is finished.
config.ok_zoomer.zoom_scrolling.reset_zo: Allows for resetting the zoom with the middle mouse button.
config.ok_zoomer.zoom_scrolling.scroll_b: Determines the base of the exponential curve used for incrementation. If unsure, keep this value at 2.
config.ok_zoomer.zoom_scrolling.scroll_r: Determines the resolution of zoom scrolling. This will effectively multiply the amount of scroll steps.
config.ok_zoomer.zoom_scrolling.scroll_s: Adds sound effects on zoom scrolling.
The maximum amount of scroll steps that the zoom can reach.
config.ok_zoomer.zoom_scrolling.transiti: The zoom will smoothly transition between each increment using cubic interpolation, balancing between linearity and smoothness.
The zoom will abruptly transition between each increment.
The zoom will linearly transition between each increment.
The zoom will smoothly transition between each increment using a sine curve.
The zoom will smoothly transition between each increment using the game's smooth curve.
The zoom will bouncily transition between each increment. Avoid using it too often!
Controls how long the transition should last for. 20 ticks is equal to 1 second.
config.ok_zoomer.zoom_scrolling.zoom_scr: Allows to increase or decrease the zoom by scrolling with the mouse wheel.
config.ok_zoomer.zoom_transition.end_tra: The zoom will smoothly transition between its on and off states using cubic interpolation, balancing between linearity and smoothness.
The zoom will abruptly transition between its on and off states.
The zoom will linearly transition between its on and off states.
The zoom will smoothly transition between its on and off states using a sine curve.
The zoom will smoothly transition between its on and off states using the game's smooth curve.
The zoom will bouncily transition between its on and off states. Avoid using it too often!
Controls how long the end transition should last for. 20 ticks is equal to 1 second.
config.ok_zoomer.zoom_transition.start_t: The zoom will smoothly transition between its off and on states using cubic interpolation, balancing between linearity and smoothness.
The zoom will abruptly transition between its off and on states.
The zoom will linearly transition between its off and on states.
The zoom will smoothly transition between its off and on states using a sine curve.
The zoom will smoothly transition between its off and on states using the game's smooth curve.
The zoom will bouncily transition between its off and on states. Avoid using it too often!
Controls how long the start transition should last for. 20 ticks is equal to 1 second.
fml.menu.mods.info.description.ok_zoomer: A zoom mod that is powerful, lean, and pretty customizable. The zoom is yours!
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.ok_zoomer: A zoom mod that is powerful, lean, and pretty customizable. The zoom is yours!
